name_cn:
Genuine leather
Moss green Model 332
Medium soft calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote
Pebble cleverly blends pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design, creating a unique and innovative bag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and function, features an adjustable shoulder strap and fits various carrying ways, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. This medium version is made of soft calfskin.
Shoulder or crossbody
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Interior pocket
Synthetic leather lining
Anagram engraved pebble
Size: 24.5*23.5*28cm
